시편 72:1.content: God, give the king your justice; your righteousness to the royal son.

시편 72:2.content: He will judge your people with righteousness, and your poor with justice.

시편 72:3.content: The mountains shall bring prosperity to the people. The hills bring the fruit of righteousness.

시편 72:4.content: He will judge the poor of the people. He will save the children of the needy, and will break the oppressor in pieces.

시편 72:5.content: They shall fear you while the sun endures; and as long as the moon, throughout all generations.

시편 72:6.content: He will come down like rain on the mown grass, as showers that water the earth.

시편 72:7.content: In his days, the righteous shall flourish, and abundance of peace, until the moon is no more.

시편 72:8.content: He shall have dominion also from sea to sea, from the River to the ends of the earth.

시편 72:9.content: Those who dwell in the wilderness shall bow before him. His enemies shall lick the dust.

시편 72:10.content: The kings of Tarshish and of the islands will bring tribute. The kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.

시편 72:11.content: Yes, all kings shall fall down before him. All nations shall serve him.

시편 72:12.content: For he will deliver the needy when he cries; the poor, who has no helper.

시편 72:13.content: He will have pity on the poor and needy. He will save the souls of the needy.

시편 72:14.content: He will redeem their soul from oppression and violence. Their blood will be precious in his sight.

시편 72:15.content: They shall live, and to him shall be given of the gold of Sheba. Men shall pray for him continually. They shall bless him all day long.

시편 72:16.content: Abundance of grain shall be throughout the land. Its fruit sways like Lebanon. Let it flourish, thriving like the grass of the field.

시편 72:17.content: His name endures forever. His name continues as long as the sun. Men shall be blessed by him. All nations will call him blessed.

시편 72:18.content: Praise be to Yahweh God, the God of Israel, who alone does marvelous deeds.

시편 72:19.content: Blessed be his glorious name forever! Let the whole earth be filled with his glory! Amen and amen.

시편 72:20.content: This ends the prayers by David, the son of Jesse.
